notes: Late public polls exist but disagree materially.
Official live-results page was checked pre-close; no vote totals are used in forecast.
Markets are included with caps, normalization, and settlement/liquidity checks.
Aggregator averages are used once and visible components are retained as deduplication evidence.
Extraordinary spending is capped because late polls already reflect much of it.
Ensemble uses more signals, but conflict penalties keep uncertainty wide.
